title: Archers Expansion (More RPG Classes)
description: Extends the Archers-Mod (RPG Series)  with new content. Spell Engine Add-On
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1BHIIm4m/images/85f6c7187993e14b785d12800ed3c539296c1cea.png) ## **🏹More Archers Content!** [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric|neoforge-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers-expansion) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu) [![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee) [![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Archers-Expansion) --- ## **📂 Installation** ### **🚨Required Mods** - [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine 'Title') - [More RPG Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-rpg-classes 'Title') - [Archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers 'Title') ### **👍Highly Recommended Mods** - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat 'Title') - [Loot & Explore](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore) & [LNE Archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/lne-archers) *** # 🏹 **Features** **These Archery Sub-Classes will enhance the experience for every ranged weapon enjoyer!** # ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/831/archerse_showcase-png.png) ## **✨Spells** Make use of the new wide range of different Archery Skills to make fighting and combat more fun, by equipping a Spell Book and unlocking all of its powerful spells! To do it, find a Spell Binding Table in village [Gazebos](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gazebos), or build your own (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table). To use the spell books: equip them and hold a weapon (vanilla, or even third party mods). # ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/832/archerse_spellbinding-png.png) ## **Bounty List** Offers the skills of  Bountyhunter with fast and tricky shots, and harmful arrows that inflict bad status effects. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/833/deadeye_spells-png.png) ## **Tundric Huntig** Offers a freezing arrows with great are effects that deal cold damage and keep the enemy slow. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/834/tundra_hunter_spells-png.png) ## **War Archery Instructions** Offers high burst damage, explosive arrows & bulky armor for a safer archery playstyle. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/835/war_archer_spells-png.png) ## More Archer equipment Enables new Armor-Sets with archery related bonuses for the new sub-classes! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/830/archerse_armors-png.png) *** ## Feel free to use this Mod in your Modpack, Video etc. If you want to give feedback about the mod or report bugs, feel free to join my Discord Server! :) ## ⚙️Configuration
⚙️Configuration

 

  • config/archers_expansion/effects.json
  • config/archers_expansion/items.json

 

🎥 Showcases

🙌Credits

 

  • Deadelus for creating the amazing Spell Engine API
  • Riot Games for creating League of Legends and inspiring the Tundra Archer Spells (Ashe´s Spells).
  • ArenaNet fro creating Guildwars 2 and inspiring the Deadeye´s & War Archer Spells.
  • Damienbrittan for creating the awesome Mod Banner!
  • SirGaith for creating the Spell Book Textures
  • Slepykat for creating the Armor Set Models
*** ### **🧙‍♂️Check out my other RPG themed Mods!** [![Berserker](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/710/berserker_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class) [![Elemental Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/711/elemental_wizards_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-wizards-rpg) [![Forcemaster](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/712/forcemaster_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcemaster-rpg-class) [![Witcher](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/713/witcher_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/witcher-rpg-class) *** ### **Want to play more RPG content? Check out the RPG Series Mods created by Daedelus!** [![Archers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/169/archers_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) [![Paladins](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/170/paladins_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) [![Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/171/wizards_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) [![Rogues](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/899/332/rogues_full_bg_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) [![Jewelry](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/760/387/jewelry_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) [![Relics](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/296/relics_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-rpg) [![Arsenal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/295/arsenal_full_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal-rpg-series) [![Armory](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/866/armory_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/armory-rpg-series) [![Skill Tree](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/865/skilltree_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skill-tree) *** ### **Check out more RPG-Content created by other Spell Engine Dev's** [![Anarchy](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1358/177/anarchy-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/anarchy-rpg) [![Mercenaries and Artificers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1346/857/merc_275-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mercenaries-and-artificers) [![Death Knigths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/953/998/death_knights_275_2.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights)
